member.name: M:GTA.World.AddExplosion(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.ExplosionType,System.Single,System.Single,GTA.Ped,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an explosion in the world
member.param: The amount of camera shake to apply to nearby cameras.

The
who caused the explosion, leave null if no one caused the explosion.

if set to
explosion can be heard.

if set to
explosion is invisible.
